programme.title: History'S Most Shocking
programme.desc: (M) Tony analyzes shocking moments: a builder on a burning ledge, kayakers swallowed by a humpback whale, a driver escaping a train, and a tailor leaping off the Eiffel Tower.

programme.title: The Engineering That Built The World
programme.desc: H2 provides history and science documentaries exploring past events, innovations, and real-world mysteries.

programme.title: History Documentary
programme.desc: H2 provides history and science documentaries exploring past events, innovations, and real-world mysteries.

programme.title: How The World Made America
programme.desc: (M) Examines the greatest human migrations of all time, and the impacts they have had - culturally, sociologically, and politically - on the United States.

programme.title: How The World Made America
programme.desc: H2 provides history and science documentaries exploring past events, innovations, and real-world mysteries.
